title: Bits & Tweaks
description: A rather large collection of Texture/Model Tweaks that enhance the player's experience. Building, Redstone, PvP, Survival, you name it. | 1.8.9, 1.18.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.x, 1.21.x
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5dTKM6yZ/images/f35892b35582f7f939181529b22307c8816e6df1.png)
# About **ItsMemed's Bits & Tweaks** is a collection of Texture/Model Tweaks made by various creators, bringing a familiar, yet different look to Vanilla Minecraft. Adding useful and aesthetically pleasing changes to the game while staying consistent with the vanilla experience. Versions previous to 1.21 having backported textures and models, all of this added to stay true with the modern Minecraft art style, while fixing various bugs. # Features Since the beginning of this project back in July 2021, a bunch of features have been added, being a rough estimate of **50+ features**. All of these features were personal choices of mine, all of them being combined to create this pack.
Show Feature List - **Overhauled Textures for commonly used PvP and Survival related items** *(Armor, Tools, Weapons, Rods, Ender Crystals, Golden Apples, Resources, etc.)* - **Overhauled Dark/Transparent GUI** *(+Realms Features)* - **Brewing Guide** - **Overhauled Redstone Utilities** *(Directional Hoppers, Observers, Droppers and Dispensers. Visual Note Block Pitches, Visual Honey Stages, Clean Redstone with Power Levels and Sticky Piston Sides)* - **Variated Textures** *(Wooden Planks, Dirt, Coarse Dirt, Grass Blocks, Cobblestone, Moss, Bricks, Birch Logs, Mushroom Blocks, End Stone, Gravel, Mycelium, Stone, Terracotta, Andesite, Diorite, Granite, Nylium and Bookshelves)* - **Connected Bookshelves** - **Brighter Nether** - **Clearer Water** - **Shorter Grass and Tall Grass** - **Softer Wool** - **Desaturated Purpur Blocks** - **HD Minecraft Title** - **HD Shield Banner Patterns** - **HD Paintings** *(+Avatar Elemental Paintings)* - **Panoramas with Shaders** *(Different on each version of the game)* - **Distinct Axolotl Buckets** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Distinct Banner Patterns** - **Distinct Melon and Pumpkin Stems** - **Distinct Infested Stone blocks and Waxed Copper Block Items** - **Unobtrusive Rain and Snow** - **Golden Apple Hunger Bar** *(+AppleSkin Compatible)* - **Hunger Preview** *(+AppleSkin Compatible)* - **Alternate Block Mining Texture*** - **Alternate Ore Textures** *(**1.8.9** Exclusive)* - **Alternate Wool Textures** *(**1.8.9** Exclusive, +Lunar Client Compatible)* - **Alternate Enchantment Glint** - **Alternate Texture for Age 25 Kelp** - **Alternate Leather Horse Armor** - **Alternate Potion, Critical Damage and Enchanted Damage Particles** - **Font Textures** *(30% Completion)* - **Lower Fire** - **Lower and Smaller Shields** - **No Vignette, Spyglass Overlay, Pumpkin Overlay** - **Red Iron Golem Flowers** - **Colorful Enchanting Table Particles** - **Pink End Rods** - **Animated Campfire Items*** *(+Animated Echo Shard)* - **3D Sun and Moon** - **Cooler Enderman and Ender Dragon Textures** - **Bat Rework Backport** - **Emissive Drowned** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **"Technoblade Never Dies!" Splash Text on all Game Versions** - **Distinct Spawn Eggs Backport** - **Distinct Sheared Sheep** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Variated Wolves Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Variated Cows, Chicken and Pigs Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Larger Wolf Collar** - **Cow and Mooshroom Model Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Vex Rework Backport** *(**CEM** Dependent)* - **Redstone Torch Model Backport** - **3D Mace** - **Nether Brick Texture Backport** - **Distinct Painting Textures** *[Animated Textures and the Mining Texture](https://imgur.com/a/IdfDdVf) **+A bunch of Texture/Model Fixes and Updates, as well as some *Easter Eggs*.**
# Credits This is a list of some really **cool people** who either made a large part of the assets seen inside this Resource Pack, or helped with the testing of this Project.
Show Credits Creators - [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) - [NeraW](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/nera_w/) (Buckets+) - [fungiworm123](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/fungiform123/) (Avatar Elemental Paintings) `"Guess What? Chicken Butt!"` - [SmellyOne](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/smellyone/) (Report Button Fix) Testers and Cool people - [Splatus](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/splatus/) (Took some screenshots, including the main banner) `"100% silly"` - VeganLettuce123, likes anime girls and develops national cyber security threats.
